identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a futuristic, command-center style interface for an AI agent orchestrator.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Cyberpunk aesthetics with Swiss Grid precision.
Emotion First: The interface should feel 'Omniscient' and 'Alive'.
Content is King: Data is the hero; the UI is the frame.
Zoom In: Focus on the active agent/voice stream.
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to make neon accents pop.

usage.h1: text-4xl md:text-6xl font-heading font-semibold tracking-tight text-white
usage.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-heading font-medium tracking-tight text-white/90
usage.caption: text-xs font-mono text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest
usage.code: font-mono text-sm bg-black/50 p-1 rounded text-cyan-400

typography.installation: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;700&family=Outfit:wght@400;500;700&display=swap');

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full border-r border-border bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl z-50

cards.style: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-border/50 rounded-xl hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)] rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent border border-border hover:border-primary/50 text-foreground hover:text-primary rounded-full px-6 py-2 transition-all

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-2 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 transition-all outline-none placeholder:text-muted-foreground

voice_visualizer.style: relative flex items-center justify-center w-32 h-32 rounded-full bg-primary/10 border border-primary/20 animate-pulse

images.description: Abstract neon lines forming a digital landscape - Use for Hero Background or Swarm Visualization backdrop
Abstract neon lines on dark background - Use for 'Connectors' or 'Skills' section background
Glowing purple ring - Use for 'Agent Active' state or loading indicators

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use 'simple-icons' for brand logos (if needed).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text has at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the dark background.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (ring-2 ring-primary).
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels for all icon-only buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors provided in this JSON. Add the fonts to index.css.
2. LAYOUT: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component that includes the Sidebar and a main content area with the 'Bento Grid' structure.
3. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components (Card, Button, Input) to match the 'Cyber-Command' aesthetic defined in 'components' section. Remove default rounded-md if it conflicts with the design.
4. VOICE UI: Build a 'VoiceOrb' component using the primary color and CSS animations to simulate listening/speaking states.
5. SWARM UI: Use the 'background' images as subtle overlays in the 'Swarm Orchestrator' section to give depth.
6. TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='voice-input-btn').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
